title: Owl's Armory
description: Uniqe weapons and armors for harsh modpacks. You can use magic too!
body:
Hello everyone, this is a mod for more armors and tools. I will update this mod time to time. So yeah, this is my first mod and i enjoyed making it. Mod is in English. Make sure to drop some comment about the mod so i can see my mistakes. (if you leave a comment other than English i can't understand it but i will give you an answer by translate so that may not be accurate)

**ABOUT THE MOD**

This mod is focusing to be much more powerfull but not in a childish way. The reason of powerfull items is this mod is not for a "one mod playthrough" its for your modpacks with great bosses or creatures. Every armor and weapon has their own style. There is a single spellbook right now but there will be more in the future. Some of the armors have diffrent effects then the others for example there is an armor called "Aodh's Robe" well the name Aodh is from irish (i am not irish), meaning "fire". The robe is for a druid named Aodh but his mind scattered all over the place and his soul is sealed in the golems core. So when you craft the robe you are actually seeing aodh's memories so when you have the advencement for the robe you can use the fire spellbook with a lesser cooldown. There would be more stuff like that. So thats about it. I will update this mod for a long time and make other mods when i get better about mod making.

**Message from 29.09.2024**

Hello friends, its been a while. I graduated from university now but i am rarely working on the mod now not because i dont have time but because i dont have ideas. I am not gonna drop the mod of course but updates will be rare. If you find something weird about the mod its probably because i changed my laptop and with that i had to make EVERYTHING from zero. Thats why there could be something wrong or unsatisfying. Sorry about that. If you didnt like a desing dont worry you are not alone but i am getting better at it. If you have a idea about the mod or some criticism **please leave a comment**.

This mod developed in MCreator

MCreator→https://mcreator.net/

 

Lastly i don't know if someone would try something like this buuuut,

Unauthorized use of textures and models is **PROHIBITED**.
**You can use this mod in mod packs, videos, reviews, and servers.**
You can not modify and share the mod without permission.
You can not repost the mod somewhere else.
You cannot sell mod related content for real money, or currency that can be bought with real money.
